reasoning: Emotional (60%): Saturated bright blue liquid reads immediately as 'mana' and conveys the warm/charming Hyrule toy-diorama mood. Warm orange-brown cork stopper provides friendly complementary accent. Round, bulbous bottle silhouette is soft and approachable — no grimness. The sloshing liquid frames add charm. Emotional target is well-hit. Technical (40%): Clear 1px hard black outlines visible at all zoom levels with no anti-aliasing bleed. Bottle body shows 3 distinct tones (shadow edge, mid, highlight). Blue liquid has explicit highlight cluster and shadow base — hard-shaded, not gradient. Cork uses 2-tone warm brown. Pixel grid appears snapped consistently across the sprite sheet. Both on dark and light backgrounds the silhouette holds cleanly. Minor: glass body shading reads slightly more 'realistic' than the flattest EoW references, but stays within acceptable range for the consumable category. Combined weighted score: emotional ~8.5 × 0.6 + technical ~7.5 × 0.4 = 5.1 + 3.0 = 8.1, rounded to 8.
